title: WorkTermTypeCodeList
description: The term or duration of the work relationship or work assignment. Options are Permanent, Probationary Temporary-Fixed, Temporary-Casual, Temporary-Seasonal.
enumNames: A work term that indicates ongoing work relationship with an organization, with no predetermined end date.
A work term that indicates a set trial period of work at the start of a potentially permanent work It is not a standalone category long term as workers usually convert to permanent or are terminated.

A work term that indicates irregular, on-call, or as-needed work, no guaranteed hours. Casual workers are temporary, but unlike fixed-term or seasonal workers, they don’t have predictable work schedules or durations.

A work term that indicates duration-specific (e.g., 6 months) work. .  It may begin and end on specified dates, or when particular events occur. It is used for unpredictable workloads, contract/project work, and other limited-term needs, such as a leave of absence.
A work term that indicates season of the year or cyclical demand work.  It is often used in retail, agriculture, tourism, etc.
